risk_title: State-Level Decision-Maker Capacity and Understanding Constraints
risk_summary: Lack of understanding of the Program-for-Results instrument among state-level decision-makers has delayed budget allocations and program execution, suggesting governance fragility and institutional capacity challenges at the state level that impede implementation.
evidence_quote: The Mid-Term Review (MTR) conducted in late 2024 identified delays in budget allocations and program execution due to a lack of understanding of the Program-for-Results (PforR) instrument among state-level decision-makers.
